description: Address 4 review issues: leaderboard response wrapper mismatch, LogicalStatisticsResponse field name mismatch, intuition leaderboard field mismatch, and tarot history response shape
steps: Step 1: Fix leaderboard endpoints - Change ApiService to return Response<List<LeaderboardEntry>> instead of Response<LeaderboardResponse> for trivia, logical, and intuition leaderboards. Update GamesRepository to return Result<List<LeaderboardEntry>> directly.
Step 2: Fix LogicalStatisticsResponse - Change @SerializedName from total_matches to total_match, change averageIq to lastIq with @SerializedName last_iq, add name field.
Step 3: Fix LeaderboardEntry - Add intuition-specific fields: totalPlayed, totalCorrect, level with appropriate @SerializedName annotations.
Step 4: Fix TarotHistoryItem - Restructure to match backend response with nested readings array. Add TarotReading data class.
acceptance_criteria: LogicalStatisticsResponse uses total_match and last_iq field names
LeaderboardEntry includes totalPlayed, totalCorrect, level fields
TarotHistoryItem has nested readings: List<TarotReading> structure
verification: Run: export JAVA_HOME=/root/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2 && export PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/Mobile-Apps/MysticNusa && ./gradlew assembleDebug
findings: Fixed has_claimed type from Boolean? to Int? in ProfileModels.kt, added Quick Navigation row (News/Stories/Staking) to HomeScreen after HeroSection, fixed ProfileScreen totalToken/lockedBalance display to show '0' instead of '0.0' when null. No other code references UserProfile.hasClaimed so no further changes needed. Build successful with only pre-existing Divider deprecation warnings.
